query: SELECT id, clientId, periodStart, periodEnd, cost, reach, thumbStopRate, holdRate, ctr, linkClicks, leads, costPerLead, leadRate, frequency, cpm FROM metrics_snapshots ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
